
Recruitment {data-navmenu="Population"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Recruitment and Residuals

```{r rec_resid_stack}
# Two-panel stack: recruitment (top) + standardised
# log-residuals (bottom)

# --- Recruitment panel ---
rec <- mv$recruitment
p_rec <- plot_ly(data = rec, x = ~year)

has_ci <- "lwr" %in% names(rec) && any(!is.na(rec$lwr))
if (has_ci) {
  p_rec <- add_ribbons(
    p = p_rec,
    ymin = ~lwr, ymax = ~upr,
    line = list(width = 0),
    fillcolor = "rgba(44,160,44,0.2)",
    showlegend = FALSE, hoverinfo = "skip"
  )
}
p_rec <- add_lines(
  p = p_rec, y = ~est,
  line = list(color = "#2ca02c", width = 2),
  name = "Recruitment", showlegend = FALSE,
  hovertemplate = "R %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"
)

# R0 reference line
rec_shapes <- list()
if (!is.null(mv$sr_params) &&
    !is.null(mv$sr_params$R0)) {
  rec_shapes <- list(list(
    type = "line",
    x0 = min(years), x1 = max(years),
    y0 = mv$sr_params$R0, y1 = mv$sr_params$R0,
    line = list(
      color = "#999999", width = 1.5, dash = "dash"
    )
  ))
}
lay_rec <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay_rec$yaxis$title <- "Recruitment"
lay_rec$shapes <- rec_shapes
p_rec <- do.call(
  what = layout, args = c(list(p = p_rec), lay_rec)
)

# --- Residuals panel ---
p_resid <- plot_ly()
if (!is.null(mv$rec_devs)) {
  rd <- mv$rec_devs
  # Standardise by sigmaR if available
  sigma <- if (!is.null(mv$sr_params) &&
               !is.null(mv$sr_params$sigmaR)) {
    mv$sr_params$sigmaR
  } else {
    1
  }
  std_resid <- rd$est / sigma
  resid_col <- ifelse(
    test = std_resid >= 0,
    yes  = "#2ca02c", no = "#d62728"
  )
  p_resid <- add_bars(
    p = p_resid,
    x = rd$year, y = std_resid,
    marker = list(color = resid_col),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    hovertemplate = "%{x}: %{y:.3f}<extra></extra>"
  )

  # Mean residual reference line
  mean_resid <- mean(std_resid, na.rm = TRUE)
  resid_shapes <- list(
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = min(rd$year), x1 = max(rd$year),
      y0 = 0, y1 = 0,
      line = list(color = "#666666", dash = "dash")
    ),
    list(
      type = "line",
      x0 = min(rd$year), x1 = max(rd$year),
      y0 = mean_resid, y1 = mean_resid,
      line = list(color = "#d62728", dash = "dot")
    )
  )
  lay_resid <- modelVis::mv_layout()
  lay_resid$xaxis$title <- "Year"
  lay_resid$yaxis$title <- "Std. residual"
  lay_resid$shapes <- resid_shapes
  p_resid <- do.call(
    what = layout,
    args = c(list(p = p_resid), lay_resid)
  )
}

p_out <- subplot(
  p_rec, p_resid,
  nrows = 2, shareX = TRUE,
  titleY = TRUE,
  heights = c(0.6, 0.4),
  margin = 0.04
)
modelVis::mv_config(p = p_out)
```

### Stock-Recruitment

```{r sr_plot, eval=!is.null(mv$stock_recruit)}
sr <- mv$stock_recruit
p <- plot_ly()

# B-H curve overlay if params available
if (has_sr) {
  ssb_range <- seq(
    from = 0,
    to = max(sr$ssb, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.1,
    length.out = 200
  )
  bh_r <- mv$sr_params$reca * ssb_range /
    (1 + mv$sr_params$recb * ssb_range)
  p <- add_lines(
    p = p,
    x = ssb_range, y = bh_r,
    line = list(color = "#cccccc", width = 2),
    name = "B-H curve", showlegend = FALSE,
    hoverinfo = "skip"
  )
}

# Observed points coloured by year
p <- add_markers(
  p = p,
  x = sr$ssb, y = sr$recruitment,
  color = ~sr$year,
  colors = c("#1f77b4", "#d62728"),
  marker = list(
    size = 6,
    line = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)
  ),
  text = ~sr$year,
  hovertemplate = paste0(
    "Year: %{text}<br>SSB: %{x:.3g}<br>",
    "R: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"
  ),
  showlegend = FALSE
)

# B0/R0 reference lines
sr_shapes <- list()
if (!is.null(mv$sr_params$B0)) {
  sr_shapes <- c(sr_shapes, list(list(
    type = "line",
    x0 = mv$sr_params$B0, x1 = mv$sr_params$B0,
    y0 = 0, y1 = 1, yref = "paper",
    line = list(
      color = "#99999966", width = 1, dash = "dash"
    )
  )))
}
if (!is.null(mv$sr_params$R0)) {
  sr_shapes <- c(sr_shapes, list(list(
    type = "line",
    x0 = 0, x1 = 1, xref = "paper",
    y0 = mv$sr_params$R0, y1 = mv$sr_params$R0,
    line = list(
      color = "#99999966", width = 1, dash = "dash"
    )
  )))
}

lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title <- "Spawning biomass"
lay$yaxis$title <- "Recruitment"
lay$title <- "Stock-Recruitment"
lay$shapes <- sr_shapes
p <- do.call(
  what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay)
)
modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
```
